tasks.instruction: Create a 12-second 1920x1080 product promo with 3 sections: Title card 'Groktopus AI' (0-4s), feature showcase 'Real-time Analytics' (4-8s), CTA 'Get Started Today' (8-12s). Add a crossfade transition between each section. Include background music via a separate <audio> element with id and src attributes.
tasks.expected_outcome: Multi-scene composition with audio element, transitions, and BGM rules followed.
tasks.success_criteria: Audio element has id= and src= attributes. data-track-index set. Transition between all scenes. All elements use gsap.from(). lint --strict passes.

tasks.instruction: Create a 10-second 1920x1080 composition showing 3 items (cards) moving through a pipeline: Stage 1 → Stage 2 → Stage 3. Each card must physically change position on screen (translate via x/y) to represent progression. Single scene, no transitions needed. Label each stage.
tasks.input_data: bg white, text #333, accent #2563eb. Font: sans-serif. 3 cards represented as colored divs.
tasks.expected_outcome: Process-flow animation where cards move between positions, not just change labels in place.
tasks.success_criteria: gsap.to() moves cards via x/y/left transforms. Cards change screen position. Labels stay readable. No text-only animations where only labels change but cards stay put. lint passes.

tasks.instruction: Create a 15-second 1920x1080 explainer with TTS narration and word-level captions. Script: 'This product makes data visualization simple and accessible for everyone.' Use the TTS workflow described in the skill. Add decorative background geometry (circles, lines) that's visual but non-distracting. Caption style: tutorial (clean sans, 48-64px, high contrast).
tasks.input_data: bg #1a1a2e, text #eee, accent #e94560. Font: system sans-serif.
tasks.expected_outcome: TTS file generated, word-level transcript produced, captions in tutorial style with proper positioning and exit guarantees.
tasks.success_criteria: TTS command used with voice from skill's guidance. Caption groups have entry AND exit (hard kill tl.set with visibility:hidden). Caption positioning follows skill rules. lint passes.
